hooks.prompt: Before stopping, verify: 1) Has .claude/features.json been updated with completed features set to 'pass'? 2) Has .claude/progress.md been updated with what was done this session? 3) Were completed features committed to git with descriptive messages? If any are missing, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "describe what's missing"}.

A UI feature was just completed. Using Playwright MCP, verify it works on both: (1) desktop at 1280x800 — navigate to http://localhost:3000, take a screenshot, verify layout matches the PRD spec in docs/PRD.md. (2) mobile at 375x667 — same verification. If layout is broken or the feature doesn't work as specified, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issue found"}. If all good, respond with {"ok": true}.

hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Fernando Resume Build"' 2>/dev/null; exit 0

echo 'CONTEXT REMINDER: Read .claude/features.json for feature status. Read .claude/progress.md for current state. Read docs/PRD.md for full specification. Pick the next FAILING feature respecting depends_on chains. Implement it, verify it works (use Playwright for UI features), update features.json to pass, update progress.md, then commit. Package manager is pnpm.'
